# PuAnnouncementBar

## Intent

- announcement bar
- announcement strip
- rotating announcement

## Prefer When

- Use for prominent page-level or banner-style announcements.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for local form helper text; use PuInlineNotice or PuFormItem.

## Import

```ts
import { PuAnnouncementBar } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

- `text`
- `prefix`
- `backgroundColor`
- `color`
- `direction`
- `scrollable`
- `closeable`
- `wrapable`

## Slots

- No slots extracted.

## Events

- `close`
- `click`

## Composition

- PuCard
